CVE-2022-26125.summary: Buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in FRRouting through 8.1.0 due to wrong checks on the input packet length in isisd/isis_tlvs.c.

CVE-2022-26126.summary: Buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in FRRouting through 8.1.0 due to the use of strdup with a non-zero-terminated binary string in isis_nb_notifications.c.

CVE-2022-26127.title: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in FRRouting through 8.1.0 ...
CVE-2022-26127.summary: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in FRRouting through 8.1.0 due to missing a check on the input packet length in the babel_packet_examin function in babeld/message.c.

CVE-2022-26128.title: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in FRRouting through 8.1.0 ...
CVE-2022-26128.summary: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in FRRouting through 8.1.0 due to a wrong check on the input packet length in the babel_packet_examin function in babeld/message.c.

CVE-2022-26129.title: Buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in FRRouting through 8.1.0  ...
CVE-2022-26129.summary: Buffer overflow vulnerabilities exist in FRRouting through 8.1.0 due to wrong checks on the subtlv length in the functions, parse_hello_subtlv, parse_ihu_subtlv, and parse_update_subtlv in babeld/message.c.

CVE-2022-37032.title: An out-of-bounds read in the BGP daemon of FRRouting FRR before 8 ...
CVE-2022-37032.summary: An out-of-bounds read in the BGP daemon of FRRouting FRR before 8.4 may lead to a segmentation fault and denial of service. This occurs in bgp_capability_msg_parse in bgpd/bgp_packet.c.

CVE-2022-37035.title: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) 8.3. In bgp_no ...
CVE-2022-37035.summary: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) 8.3. In bgp_notify_send_with_data() and bgp_process_packet() in bgp_packet.c, there is a possible use-after-free due to a race condition. This could lead to Remote Code Execution or Information Disclosure by sending crafted BGP packets. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

CVE-2022-40302.title: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) through 8.4. B ...
CVE-2022-40302.summary: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) through 8.4. By crafting a BGP OPEN message with an option of type 0xff (Extended Length from RFC 9072), attackers may cause a denial of service (assertion failure and daemon restart, or out-of-bounds read). This is possible because of inconsistent boundary checks that do not account for reading 3 bytes (instead of 2) in this 0xff case.

CVE-2022-40318.title: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) through 8.4. B ...
CVE-2022-40318.summary: An issue was discovered in bgpd in FRRouting (FRR) through 8.4. By crafting a BGP OPEN message with an option of type 0xff (Extended Length from RFC 9072), attackers may cause a denial of service (assertion failure and daemon restart, or out-of-bounds read). This is possible because of inconsistent boundary checks that do not account for reading 3 bytes (instead of 2) in this 0xff case. NOTE: this behavior occurs in bgp_open_option_parse in the bgp_open.c file, a different location (with a different attack vector) relative to CVE-2022-40302.

CVE-2022-43681.title: An out-of-bounds read exists in the BGP daemon of FRRouting FRR t ...
CVE-2022-43681.summary: An out-of-bounds read exists in the BGP daemon of FRRouting FRR through 8.4. When sending a malformed BGP OPEN message that ends with the option length octet (or the option length word, in case of an extended OPEN message), the FRR code reads of out of the bounds of the packet, throwing a SIGABRT signal and exiting. This results in a bgpd daemon restart, causing a Denial-of-Service condition.

CVE-2023-31490.title: An issue found in Frrouting bgpd v.8.4.2 allows a remote attacker ...
CVE-2023-31490.summary: An issue found in Frrouting bgpd v.8.4.2 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the bgp_attr_psid_sub() function.

CVE-2023-38406.title: bgpd/bgp_flowspec.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.4.3 mishandles an ...
CVE-2023-38406.summary: bgpd/bgp_flowspec.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.4.3 mishandles an nlri length of zero, aka a "flowspec overflow."

CVE-2023-38407.title: bgpd/bgp_label.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.5 attempts to read b ...
CVE-2023-38407.summary: bgpd/bgp_label.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.5 attempts to read beyond the end of the stream during labeled unicast parsing.

CVE-2023-38802.title: FRRouting FRR 7.5.1 through 9.0 and Pica8 PICOS 4.3.3.2 allow a r ...
CVE-2023-38802.summary: FRRouting FRR 7.5.1 through 9.0 and Pica8 PICOS 4.3.3.2 allow a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via a crafted BGP update with a corrupted attribute 23 (Tunnel Encapsulation).

CVE-2023-41358.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgpd/bgp_pa ...
CVE-2023-41358.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgpd/bgp_packet.c processes NLRIs if the attribute length is zero.

CVE-2023-41360.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgpd/bgp_pa ...
CVE-2023-41360.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgpd/bgp_packet.c can read the initial byte of the ORF header in an ahead-of-stream situation.

CVE-2023-41909.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgp_nlri_pa ...
CVE-2023-41909.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0. bgp_nlri_parse_flowspec in bgpd/bgp_flowspec.c processes malformed requests with no attributes, leading to a NULL pointer dereference.

CVE-2023-46752.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. It mishan ...
CVE-2023-46752.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. It mishandles malformed MP_REACH_NLRI data, leading to a crash.

CVE-2023-46753.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-46753.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur for a crafted BGP UPDATE message without mandatory attributes, e.g., one with only an unknown transit attribute.

CVE-2023-47234.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-47234.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur when processing a crafted BGP UPDATE message with a MP_UNREACH_NLRI attribute and additional NLRI data (that lacks mandatory path attributes).

CVE-2023-47235.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-47235.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur when a malformed BGP UPDATE message with an EOR is processed, because the presence of EOR does not lead to a treat-as-withdraw outcome.

CVE-2024-27913.title: ospf_te_parse_te in ospfd/ospf_te.c in FRRouting (FRR) through 9. ...
CVE-2024-27913.summary: ospf_te_parse_te in ospfd/ospf_te.c in FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (ospfd daemon crash) via a malformed OSPF LSA packet, because of an attempted access to a missing attribute field.

CVE-2024-31948.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an attacker using a malformed Pre ...
CVE-2024-31948.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an attacker using a malformed Prefix SID attribute in a BGP UPDATE packet can cause the bgpd daemon to crash.

CVE-2024-31949.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an infinite loop can occur when r ...
CVE-2024-31949.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an infinite loop can occur when receiving a MP/GR capability as a dynamic capability because malformed data results in a pointer not advancing.

CVE-2024-31950.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow an ...
CVE-2024-31950.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow and daemon crash in ospf_te_parse_ri for OSPF LSA packets during an attempt to read Segment Routing subTLVs (their size is not validated).

CVE-2024-31951.title: In the Opaque LSA Extended Link parser in FRRouting (FRR) through ...
CVE-2024-31951.summary: In the Opaque LSA Extended Link parser in FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow and daemon crash in ospf_te_parse_ext_link for OSPF LSA packets during an attempt to read Segment Routing Adjacency SID subTLVs (lengths are not validated).

CVE-2024-34088.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, it is possible for the get_edge() ...
CVE-2024-34088.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, it is possible for the get_edge() function in ospf_te.c in the OSPF daemon to return a NULL pointer. In cases where calling functions do not handle the returned NULL value, the OSPF daemon crashes, leading to denial of service.

CVE-2024-44070.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting (FRR) through 10.1. bgp_attr ...
CVE-2024-44070.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting (FRR) through 10.1. bgp_attr_encap in bgpd/bgp_attr.c does not check the actual remaining stream length before taking the TLV value.

CVE-2024-55553.title: In FRRouting (FRR) before 10.3 from 6.0 onward, all routes are re ...
CVE-2024-55553.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) before 10.3 from 6.0 onward, all routes are re-validated if the total size of an update received via RTR exceeds the internal socket's buffer size, default 4K on most OSes. An attacker can use this to trigger re-parsing of the RIB for FRR routers using RTR by causing more than this number of updates during an update interval (usually 30 minutes). Additionally, this effect regularly occurs organically. Furthermore, an attacker can use this to trigger route validation continuously. Given that routers with large full tables may need more than 30 minutes to fully re-validate the table, continuous issuance/withdrawal of large numbers of ROA may be used to impact the route handling performance of all FRR instances using RPKI globally. Additionally, the re-validation will cause heightened BMP traffic to ingestors. Fixed Versions: 10.0.3, 10.1.2, 10.2.1, >= 10.3.

CVE-2025-61099.summary: FRRouting/frr from v2.0 through v10.4.1 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer dereference via the opaque_info_detail function at ospf_opaque.c. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted LS Update packet.

CVE-2025-61100.summary: FRRouting/frr from v2.0 through v10.4.1 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer dereference via the ospf_opaque_lsa_dump function at ospf_opaque.c. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) under specific malformed LSA conditions.

CVE-2024-27913.title: ospf_te_parse_te in ospfd/ospf_te.c in FRRouting (FRR) through 9. ...
CVE-2024-27913.summary: ospf_te_parse_te in ospfd/ospf_te.c in FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (ospfd daemon crash) via a malformed OSPF LSA packet, because of an attempted access to a missing attribute field.

CVE-2025-61099.title: FRRouting/frr from v2.0 through v10.4.1 was discovered to contain ...
CVE-2025-61099.summary: FRRouting/frr from v2.0 through v10.4.1 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer dereference via the opaque_info_detail function at ospf_opaque.c. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted LS Update packet.

CVE-2025-61104.title: FRRouting/frr from v4.0 through v10.4.1 was discovered to contain ...
CVE-2025-61104.summary: FRRouting/frr from v4.0 through v10.4.1 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer dereference via the show_vty_unknown_tlv function at ospf_ext.c. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted OSPF packet.

CVE-2023-38407.title: bgpd/bgp_label.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.5 attempts to read b ...
CVE-2023-38407.summary: bgpd/bgp_label.c in FRRouting (FRR) before 8.5 attempts to read beyond the end of the stream during labeled unicast parsing.

CVE-2023-46752.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. It mishan ...
CVE-2023-46752.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. It mishandles malformed MP_REACH_NLRI data, leading to a crash.

CVE-2023-46753.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-46753.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur for a crafted BGP UPDATE message without mandatory attributes, e.g., one with only an unknown transit attribute.

CVE-2023-47234.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-47234.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur when processing a crafted BGP UPDATE message with a MP_UNREACH_NLRI attribute and additional NLRI data (that lacks mandatory path attributes).

CVE-2023-47235.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash c ...
CVE-2023-47235.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting FRR through 9.0.1. A crash can occur when a malformed BGP UPDATE message with an EOR is processed, because the presence of EOR does not lead to a treat-as-withdraw outcome.

CVE-2024-27913.title: ospf_te_parse_te in ospfd/ospf_te.c in FRRouting (FRR) through 9. ...
CVE-2024-27913.summary: ospf_te_parse_te in ospfd/ospf_te.c in FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (ospfd daemon crash) via a malformed OSPF LSA packet, because of an attempted access to a missing attribute field.

CVE-2024-31948.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an attacker using a malformed Pre ...
CVE-2024-31948.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an attacker using a malformed Prefix SID attribute in a BGP UPDATE packet can cause the bgpd daemon to crash.

CVE-2024-31949.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an infinite loop can occur when r ...
CVE-2024-31949.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, an infinite loop can occur when receiving a MP/GR capability as a dynamic capability because malformed data results in a pointer not advancing.

CVE-2024-31950.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow an ...
CVE-2024-31950.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow and daemon crash in ospf_te_parse_ri for OSPF LSA packets during an attempt to read Segment Routing subTLVs (their size is not validated).

CVE-2024-31951.title: In the Opaque LSA Extended Link parser in FRRouting (FRR) through ...
CVE-2024-31951.summary: In the Opaque LSA Extended Link parser in FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, there can be a buffer overflow and daemon crash in ospf_te_parse_ext_link for OSPF LSA packets during an attempt to read Segment Routing Adjacency SID subTLVs (lengths are not validated).

CVE-2024-34088.title: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, it is possible for the get_edge() ...
CVE-2024-34088.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) through 9.1, it is possible for the get_edge() function in ospf_te.c in the OSPF daemon to return a NULL pointer. In cases where calling functions do not handle the returned NULL value, the OSPF daemon crashes, leading to denial of service.

CVE-2024-44070.title: An issue was discovered in FRRouting (FRR) through 10.1. bgp_attr ...
CVE-2024-44070.summary: An issue was discovered in FRRouting (FRR) through 10.1. bgp_attr_encap in bgpd/bgp_attr.c does not check the actual remaining stream length before taking the TLV value.

CVE-2024-55553.title: In FRRouting (FRR) before 10.3 from 6.0 onward, all routes are re ...
CVE-2024-55553.summary: In FRRouting (FRR) before 10.3 from 6.0 onward, all routes are re-validated if the total size of an update received via RTR exceeds the internal socket's buffer size, default 4K on most OSes. An attacker can use this to trigger re-parsing of the RIB for FRR routers using RTR by causing more than this number of updates during an update interval (usually 30 minutes). Additionally, this effect regularly occurs organically. Furthermore, an attacker can use this to trigger route validation continuously. Given that routers with large full tables may need more than 30 minutes to fully re-validate the table, continuous issuance/withdrawal of large numbers of ROA may be used to impact the route handling performance of all FRR instances using RPKI globally. Additionally, the re-validation will cause heightened BMP traffic to ingestors. Fixed Versions: 10.0.3, 10.1.2, 10.2.1, >= 10.3.
